general.name: Ahmed Hany
general.description: Software Engineer focused on crafting high-performance mobile applications through clean architecture, modern engineering practices, and user-centered design.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: I transform ideas into digital experiences by analyzing challenges, designing intuitive solutions, writing clean and maintainable code, and solving real-world problems that drive meaningful results.

platform_architecture.title: Platform & scalable architecture
platform_architecture.description: Building scalable Flutter applications with maintainable codebases, clean boundaries, and architectural patterns designed for long-term growth, team collaboration, and product evolution.

state_management.title: State & presentation depth
state_management.description: Delivering predictable application state and polished user experiences through modern state management approaches, reusable UI patterns, and performance-focused presentation layers.

apis_sync.title: APIs, sync & real-time
apis_sync.description: Creating resilient communication layers between mobile applications and backend services with real-time updates, offline support, caching strategies, and reliable synchronization.

data_security.title: Persistence, security & data
data_security.description: Implementing secure data storage, local persistence, encryption, and authentication strategies that ensure reliability, privacy, and seamless user experiences.

performance_reliability.title: Native, performance & reliability
performance_reliability.description: Optimizing applications for speed, stability, and production readiness with native integrations, performance monitoring, automated testing, and debugging workflows.

mobile_devops.title: Delivery & mobile DevOps
mobile_devops.description: Automating build, testing, and deployment pipelines to accelerate releases, improve reliability, and maintain efficient delivery processes across development teams.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: A timeline of my professional growth in software engineering, building scalable mobile applications, delivering production-ready solutions, and creating impactful digital experiences.

adwar_logistics.work_description: Developing a cross-platform logistics application focused on driver operations, shipment management, pickups, and deliveries. Implementing barcode scanning, proof of delivery, route tracking, real-time updates, offline support, and scalable logistics workflows.

meem_market.work_description: Developing internal and business-critical retail applications including HR management, stock tracking, price checking, and POS systems while delivering scalable and high-performance cross-platform solutions.

tharad_tech.work_description: Contributed to multiple production Flutter applications by implementing cross-platform features, API integrations, responsive interfaces, performance improvements, and bug fixes using modern development practices.

depi.work_description: Completed an intensive training program focused on building production-ready Flutter applications using clean architecture, state management, Firebase, API integration, and Agile development practices.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Showcasing innovative mobile applications, scalable architectures, and high-quality digital products crafted to solve real-world challenges and create meaningful user value.

qutouf_al_daad.title: Qutouf Al Daad
qutouf_al_daad.about: An advanced educational platform designed to make Arabic language learning interactive, engaging, and accessible for students, teachers, and parents.
qutouf_al_daad.description: Qutouf Al Daad is a comprehensive Arabic learning platform built with Flutter and Clean Architecture. The application provides a complete educational ecosystem where students can access lessons, assignments, and exams, teachers can create and manage educational content, and parents can monitor academic performance. The platform supports real-time updates, push notifications, bilingual localization, performance analytics, AI-powered assistance, and a modern user experience across Android and iOS.
qutouf_al_daad.feature1: Interactive lessons with videos, documents, and educational resources
qutouf_al_daad.feature2: Online examinations with automatic grading and performance tracking
qutouf_al_daad.feature3: Dedicated dashboards for students, teachers, and parents
qutouf_al_daad.feature4: Real-time notifications and synchronization using Firebase
qutouf_al_daad.feature5: AI-powered assistant for helping students during learning
qutouf_al_daad.feature6: Bilingual support with Arabic and English localization

carzo.title: Carzo
carzo.about: A modern automotive marketplace that enables users to discover, compare, buy, and sell vehicles while accessing insurance, maintenance, rescue, and dealership services through a unified mobile experience.
carzo.description: Carzo is a feature-rich automotive marketplace application built with Flutter and Clean Architecture. The platform simplifies the car buying and selling journey by providing advanced vehicle browsing, smart filtering, side-by-side comparisons, dealership discovery, and integrated automotive services. Users can explore detailed vehicle information, schedule inquiries, save favorites, and receive assistance through an intelligent chatbot. Designed with scalability and performance in mind, Carzo delivers a seamless and intuitive experience for both car buyers and automotive service providers.
carzo.feature1: Browse, search, and discover vehicles with advanced filtering and sorting options
carzo.feature2: Compare multiple vehicles side-by-side to make informed purchasing decisions
carzo.feature3: Access integrated automotive services including insurance, maintenance, and roadside assistance
carzo.feature4: Manage favorites, inquiries, and bookings through a personalized user dashboard
carzo.feature5: Receive instant assistance through an AI-powered chatbot and customer support system
carzo.feature6: Enjoy a modern, responsive, and user-friendly automotive marketplace experience

modish.title: Modish
modish.about: A modern fashion e-commerce application designed to deliver a premium shopping experience through elegant design, seamless navigation, personalized discovery, and powerful product exploration.
modish.description: Modish is a fashion-focused e-commerce application built with Flutter, offering a refined and intuitive shopping experience for modern consumers. The platform enables users to discover trending fashion products, browse curated collections, save favorite items, and manage their profiles through a visually appealing interface. Built with scalability, performance, and maintainability in mind, Modish combines responsive design, efficient state management, and seamless API integration to deliver a smooth and engaging mobile commerce experience.
modish.feature1: Explore fashion products through curated collections and category-based browsing
modish.feature2: Search and discover products quickly using smart search and filtering capabilities
modish.feature3: Save favorite items with a personalized wishlist experience
modish.feature4: Manage user profiles, preferences, and account information with ease
modish.feature5: Receive notifications about new arrivals, promotions, and special offers
modish.feature6: Enjoy a modern, responsive, and visually appealing shopping experience

qoot.title: Qoot
qoot.about: A social impact platform that connects restaurants, charities, and communities to reduce food waste, streamline food donations, and support those in need through a modern digital experience.
qoot.description: Qoot is a comprehensive food donation management platform built with Flutter and Clean Architecture. The platform bridges the gap between restaurants with surplus food and charities serving vulnerable communities, enabling efficient and transparent donation workflows. Through dedicated experiences for restaurants and charities, real-time donation tracking, analytics dashboards, secure authentication, and bilingual support, Qoot transforms traditional food donation processes into a scalable, technology-driven ecosystem that creates measurable social impact.
qoot.feature1: Connect restaurants and charities through a unified food donation ecosystem
qoot.feature2: Manage food donations, reservations, pickups, and donation tracking in real time
qoot.feature3: Provide dedicated dashboards and workflows for both restaurants and charitable organizations
qoot.feature4: Track donation statistics, trends, and impact through analytics and reporting tools
qoot.feature5: Support secure authentication, role-based access control, and account management
qoot.feature6: Deliver a bilingual and accessible experience with Arabic and English localization

contact_section.subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, exciting projects, and meaningful collaborations. Whether you have an idea, a question, or simply want to connect, feel free to reach out, and let's build something great together.
